# Lourvens

> Self-taught fullstack developer building applied AI systems, robust agentic systems, and GenAI products in Python. TypeScript production background. Active on GitHub since 2020.

## Focus
- Building AI systems & robust agentic systems: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, MCP tool servers (deep study)
- AgentOps: evaluation, observability, reliability, HITL gates, deployment
- GenAI engineering: Python, FastAPI, RAG pipelines, vector databases
- AI governance: safety, evals, monitoring

## Reading (foundation)
- Transformer internals, inference optimization, quantization

## Next focus
- Fine-tuning, RL, deeper GenAI techniques

## Stack
- Fullstack: TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, Laravel, MongoDB, Redis, PostgreSQL, Tailwind
- AI: Python, FastAPI, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, RAG + Vector DB, Docker, Git

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/Lourvens
- Portfolio: https://lourvens.vercel.app
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/LLuxamar

## Top projects
- multi-source-research-intelligence-agent — Python agentic RAG over papers, patents, news, datasets
- Nexlifycorp — LangGraph multi-agent enterprise AI (financial intelligence, compliance, research)
- exam-haiti-agent — Python agent for Haitian exam prep (⭐ 1)
- sql-agent — Python agent for SQL workflows
- lofi — TypeScript web app, most starred (⭐ 11)

## Credentials
- Databricks Academy Accreditation — Generative AI Fundamentals (issued 2026-05-24)
- Quickstart: LangChain Essentials — Python (LangChain Academy, issued 2025-12-25)
